issues.description: FlipLife action is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may add 1 card' — should be optional. Need to wrap in a conditional or use optional flag if DSL supports it.

Target scope should include Leader cards explicitly: 'Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards' — current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' may not include Leader. Should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter' or similar.
'during this turn' matches 'EndOfTurn' but could be more precisely 'DuringYourTurn' depending on DSL semantics for post-play effects.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main]/[Counter] You may add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this turn.
